Actions.Text: REFERRED TO CORPORATIONS, AUTHORITIES AND COMMISSIONS

Title: Relates to disclosure of amounts in trust for the perpetual care of cemetery lots
Summary: Requires biennial disclosure by trustees or executors of amounts in trust for the perpetual care of cemetery lots to a cemetery association.
LawCode: Amd §1507, N-PC L; amd §8-1.5, EPT L
ActClause: AN ACT to amend the not-for-profit corporation law and the estates, powers and trusts law, in relation to perpetual care of cemeteries
